properties.displayName: Saudi Arabia Government Cloud Security Controls
properties.description: Saudi Arabia Government consolidated cloud security compliance framework covering NCA Critical Systems Cybersecurity Controls (CSCC-1:2019), National Data Management Office (NDMO) data management and personal data protection standards, and Saudi Personal Data Protection Law (PDPL). Applicable to Saudi government entities and operators of critical national infrastructure deploying cloud services.

metadata.authority: National Cybersecurity Authority (NCA), National Data Management Office (NDMO)

policyDefinitionGroups.name: KSA_GOV
policyDefinitionGroups.description: NCA CSCC requirements for cybersecurity strategy, risk management, IT project security, periodic audit, and human resources security for critical systems.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: KSA_INF
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Compute hardening, virtual network isolation, storage encryption with customer-managed keys, and secure boot requirements for cloud infrastructure.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: KSA_PLA
policyDefinitionGroups.description: API gateway security, database security controls, container image scanning, and serverless function security requirements.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: KSA_DAT
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Data classification per NCA and NDMO guidelines, data masking, data residency within Saudi Arabia, and data retention and deletion policies.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: KSA_IAM
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Identity federation with national infrastructure, just-in-time privileged access management, service account security, and periodic access reviews.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: KSA_NET
policyDefinitionGroups.description: DDoS protection, web application firewall with OWASP rules, private connectivity via private endpoints, and network traffic monitoring.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: KSA_SEC
policyDefinitionGroups.description: SIEM integration, threat intelligence sharing with NCA, security automation, and vulnerability management within NCA-mandated timelines.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: KSA_COM
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Regulatory mapping to NCA CSCC, NDMO, and PDPL; comprehensive audit logging; compliance reporting; and third-party attestation requirements.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: KSA_DR
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Automated and tested backup and recovery strategies for all critical systems and data.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: KSA_NDM
policyDefinitionGroups.description: NDMO requirements for data governance, enterprise data catalog, data quality standards, data architecture, and interoperability between government entities.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: KSA_NDP
policyDefinitionGroups.description: Saudi Personal Data Protection Law (PDPL) and NDMO privacy requirements: personal data protection, consent management, and data subject rights.

policyDefinitionGroups.name: KSA_NDS
policyDefinitionGroups.description: NDMO authorized data sharing between government entities, formal data sharing agreements with security requirements and audit obligations.
